mechanics.excerpt: On most occasions; these different levels work harmony: To deal with the occasional conflicts that arise, the Clans have developed rituals and trials to minimize strife The most common are described below: Trial of Possession The Trial of Possession uses force t0 determine ownership control of property: anything from BattleMech or genetic legacy to world.
